chunks.text: Copyright for Colt Copyright for Colt The Ptolemy II Colt actors use the Colt library from http://hoschek.home.cern.ch/hoschek/colt/ to generate random numbers. These actors were written by David Bauer, Kostas Oikonomou, and Edward A. Lee. Colt is a

er, Kostas Oikonomou, and Edward A. Lee. Colt is an "Open Source Libraries for High Performance Scientific and Technical Computing in Java" We ship a subset of Colt classes we need in $PTII/lib/ptcolt.jar . The portion of Colt that we ship has the fo

.jar . The portion of Colt that we ship has the following licenses: packages cern.colt* , cern.jet*, cern.clhep Written by Wolfgang Hoschek . Check the Colt home page for more info. Copyright (c) 1999 CERN - European Organization fo

dated to RngPack 1.1a, which "fixes a number of serious bugs in RngPack 1.0 including an incorrect coefficient in the Ranecu implementation and fixes an off-by-one error in the choice() method." In addition, RngPack 1.1a is release under the BSD Lice
